columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: Order line type

columns.name: TRANSACTIONID
columns.description: Unique transaction identifier

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Article or document number

columns.name: ORDRENR
columns.description: Order identifier

columns.name: ORDRELINJENR
columns.description: Order line number

columns.name: LINJENR
columns.description: Line number in the order

columns.name: EXTERNALID
columns.description: External unique identifier for the line item

columns.name: BOXNO
columns.description: Number of the box containing the item

columns.name: ORDERED
columns.description: Quantity ordered for the line item

columns.name: ARTICLENUMBER
columns.description: Unique identifier of the article

columns.name: ARTICLEWIDTH
columns.description: Width of the article in centimeters

columns.name: ARTICLEHEIGHT
columns.description: Height of the article in centimeters

columns.name: ARTICLELENGTH
columns.description: Length of the article in centimeters

columns.name: ARTICLEVOLUME
columns.description: Volume of the article in cubic meters

columns.name: ARTICLEWEIGHT
columns.description: Weight of the article in kilograms

columns.name: NUMBEROFPACKAGES
columns.description: Number of packages for the line item

columns.name: WIDTH
columns.description: Width in centimeters (likely redundant with ARTICLEWIDTH)

columns.name: HEIGHT
columns.description: Height in centimeters (likely redundant with ARTICLEHEIGHT)

columns.name: LENGTH
columns.description: Length in centimeters (likely redundant with ARTICLELENGTH)

columns.name: CUBIC
columns.description: Cubic content of the article in cubic meters

columns.name: WEIGHT
columns.description: Weight in kilograms (likely redundant with ARTICLEWEIGHT)

columns.name: ARTICLEDESCRIPTION
columns.description: Detailed description of the article

columns.name: SHIPPERARTICLENO
columns.description: Shipment article number from the shipper

columns.name: UNITCODE
columns.description: Measurement unit code

columns.name: DELIVERED
columns.description: Quantity delivered for the line item

columns.name: COUNTRYOFORIGION
columns.description: Country of origin

columns.name: CURRENCYCODE
columns.description: Currency code for the transaction

columns.name: ADR_UNNUMBER
columns.description: ADR (United Nations number) of the dangerous goods article

columns.name: ADR_UNNAME
columns.description: Description of the ADR (United Nations number)

columns.name: ADR_DANGERCLASS
columns.description: Hazard class for dangerous goods article according to ADR

columns.name: ADR_EMBGROUP
columns.description: Emergency measure group for the ADR classification

columns.name: ADR_TUNNELRESTR
columns.description: Tunnel restrictions for dangerous goods article according to ADR

columns.name: ADR_GROSSWEIGHT
columns.description: Gross weight of the dangerous goods in kilograms

columns.name: ADR_NETWEIGHT
columns.description: Net weight of the dangerous goods in kilograms

columns.name: ADR_POINTS
columns.description: Transport points for the ADR classification

columns.name: KONSOLIDERES
columns.description: Flag indicating whether the line item should be consolidated

columns.name: FROMDATE
columns.description: Start date of validity for the transaction or document

columns.name: FROZEN
columns.description: Flag indicating if the line item is frozen (inactive)

columns.name: FROZENREASON
columns.description: Reason for freezing the line item
